name: Chicken and Noodle Cacciatore
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup green pepper, cut in strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the chicken and place it in a large deep kettle with water, celery, and onion. Add 3/4 teaspoon salt. Cover tightly and simmer for 3 to 4 hours until tender.
2. Cool the chicken and remove the meat, cutting it into large serving pieces. Reserve the broth.
3. Heat vegetable oil in a large skillet. Sauté chopped onion and garlic until soft.
4. Add tomatoes, stuffed olives, mushrooms, green pepper, 1/4 teaspoon salt, pepper, and basil. Continue cooking over low heat for 20 minutes.
5. Skim fat from the chicken broth. Measure the broth and add enough water to make 5 cups. Pour into a large saucepan.
6. Bring to a boil and add the remaining 2 1/2 teaspoons salt and noodles. Bring to a boil again, then cook for 10 to 15 minutes or until tender. Drain.
7. Place in a shallow 2-quart baking dish. Heat the oven to 350°F.
8. Arrange chicken on noodles and pour sauce over everything. Bake for 20 minutes. Makes 8 servings.
